zh.lifeSummary: 當James Gresham於1430年出生在英國諾福爾可霍爾特時，他的父親Sir John Gresham The Younger40歲，母親Margaret Rockwood29歲。他於大約1449年與Mararey Rockwood結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1442年住在英國英格蘭諾福爾可易亞斯特 貝克漢姆。他去世於1497年在英國諾福爾可霍爾特享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Gresham于1430年出生在英国諾福爾可霍爾特时，他的父亲Sir John Gresham The Younger40岁，母亲Margaret Rockwood29岁。他于大约1449年与Mararey Rockwood结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1442年住在英国英格兰諾福爾可易亞斯特 貝克漢姆。他去世于1497年在英国諾福爾可霍爾特享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gresham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lincolnshire): habitational name from a place in Norfolk, so named from Old English græs, gærs ‘grass(land), pasturage’ + hām ‘homestead’ or hamm ‘enclosure hemmed in by water’.

variants.name: Grisham
meanings: English: variant of   Gresham  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When James Gresham was born in 1430, in Holt, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir John Gresham The Younger, was 40 and his mother, Margaret Rockwood, was 29. He married Mararey Rockwood about 1449. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He lived in East Beckham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom in 1442. He died in 1497, in Holt, Norfolk, England, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Gresham est né en 1430, à Holt, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Gresham The Younger, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Margaret Rockwood, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Mararey Rockwood environ 1449. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il a vécu à East Beckham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1442. Il est décédé en 1497, à Holt, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans.

Er hat um 1449 Mararey Rockwood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. 1442 hat er in East Beckham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Er starb 1497 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Holt, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Gresham è nato il nel 1430 nel Holt, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir John Gresham The Younger, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Rockwood, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Mararey Rockwood circa 1449. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Vissuto a East Beckham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1442. Morì nel 1497, nel Holt, Norfolk, England, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: James Greshamが1430年にイギリスノーフォルクホルトで生まれた時，父Sir John Gresham The Youngerは40歳，母Margaret Rockwoodは29歳であった。約1449年にMararey Rockwoodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1442年にはイギリスイギリスノーフォルクエアスト ベックハムに住んでいた。彼は1497年にイギリスノーフォルクホルトで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: James Gresham(이)가 1430년 영국 노르폴크 홀트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Gresham The Younger(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Rockwood(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1449년 Mararey Rockwood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1442년도에 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 이스트 벡함에서 살았다. 그는 1497년 영국 노르폴크 홀트에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Gresham nasceu em 1430, em Holt, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Gresham The Younger, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Rockwood, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Mararey Rockwood aproximadamente 1449. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele viveu em East Beckham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1442. ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Gresham родился в 1430 г. в местности холт, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Gresham The Younger было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Rockwood, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Mararey Rockwood около 1449 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности эаст беккхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в 1442 году. Он умер в 1497 г. в местности холт, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 67 лет.
